label: The Library — fixes
items: Instant open — tapping a search result now jumps to the plant page immediately, with a placeholder showing the name and thumbnail. The full care guide, grow guide, companions and light data load in the background, so by the time you tap a tab the data is already on the way (or arrived).

AI plant care guide is no longer empty — the comprehensive Gemini-generated care data is now read out of the catalogue blob and rendered into the same form layout The Shed uses (sunlight, watering, propagation, pruning, edibility, toxicity, wildlife, description, etc.).
AI search results now reliably show a thumbnail in the list — a StrictMode double-invoke was skipping the lookup before.
